description: Promise chain with promisified exec. Input flows through multiple await steps. Scanner cannot trace through promisify wrappers.

expected.notes: input (auto-seeded handler param) flows through execAsync — promisify-aware alias + hardcoded execAsync matcher fire CMD_INJECT

safePipeline sanitizes via regex replace (alphanumeric allowlist) but scanner does not model .replace() with regex as a sanitizer; current behavior is to report the flow to execAsync — aspirationally suppressible once replace-based sanitizers are recognized
execAsync called without validation of input
structural: cfg-unguarded-sink on high-risk sink at line 4 — taint active but no confirmed flow
